name: spx_es_3m
description: Synthetic three-month E-mini S&P 500 futures contract.

provenance.source_detail: Finstack canonical pricing calculation on deterministic synthetic market inputs Phase-2 envelope migration (2026-05-09): Tier-A wrap. The original snapshot is preserved verbatim in initial_market with empty plan.steps; no calibration math changes. Pricing tolerance contracts preserved.
provenance.regen_command: manual formula fixture; values captured from canonical pricing runner

plan.description: Tier-A wrap (Phase-2 envelope migration, 2026-05-09): the original market snapshot is preserved in initial_market with empty plan.steps. Routes through engine::execute_with_diagnostics without changing pricing math.

source_reference.planned_metrics_reason: Design alias dv01_rate maps to strict dv01; futures_price and basis are now compared directly.

npv.tolerance_reason: Formula self-test: tolerance pinned to ~10x the worst observed deterministic FP residual (1.16e-10 abs / 2.8e-11 rel) for canonical pricing on synthetic inputs. Tightening from 1e-6 to 1e-9 catches drift introduced by refactors, FP-contract changes, or algorithm swaps that would otherwise be invisible at the looser band.
